widgets_values:
Epic fantasy battle scene.

A powerful warrior in glowing armor runs across a battlefield while magical energy swirls around him.

The camera circles around the warrior as he jumps into the air and slams his sword into the ground, releasing a massive shockwave that throws enemies into the air.

Dust, fire, debris, and magical light explode outward.

Cinematic camera movement, slow motion impact, dramatic lighting, epic fantasy movie style.

The soldier suddenly slides out from cover and fires his rifle toward enemies.

Bullet casings fly through the air as sparks burst from metal surfaces.

The camera performs a dramatic slow-motion rotation around the soldier while smoke and debris fill the warehouse.

Cinematic motion blur, dynamic lighting, intense gunfight choreography, Hollywood action movie style.
